Previous page Ready to use Simply push 5cm into the soil around the base of the plant, for bigger, healthier plants in no time. For indoor and outdoor use Small but mighty, the food cones can be used indoor or out, giving you healthier and happier plants. Easy to use For the best results use in early spring. One application will last 6 months. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Ready To Use 2 For Indoors & Outdoors 3 Easy To Use 4 Pet & Child Friendly Glorious growth for all your plants No mixing, no measuring, no mess. Just one Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants cone will give you glorious results that last for 6 months. For use on all plants, indoor or out, Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants is suited to the needs of all growers and particularly effective for plants in small spaces. Packaging made from 80% recycled material. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants? No mixing, no measuring, no mess. Just one food cone of Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants will feed your plant for 6 months. All glory, no graft! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants? Small but mighty - use on any plant, indoor or outdoor, straight on the soil. When should I use Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants? Only feed when plants are actively growing. One cone will give you glorious results that last for 6 months. How do I use Miracle-Gro Push & Feed Food For All Plants? Push a food cone 5cm into the soil. Water as usual. Enjoy! Wash hands after use. Keep out of reach of children.
